ModMetaData.name: Keep Burning, Corpse!
ModMetaData.author: Tixiv
ModMetaData.description:
Have you ever wondered why the fire goes out when a pawn that is on fire dies? It doesn't seem realistic, and with Shamblers an Death Pall it's a real nuisance.
Turns out this is actually a bug, as Rimworld has specific code to keep the fire when a pawn dies. It just doesn't work out of the box since the check for the fire is done after the fire is already removed.
This mod fixes that: If anything dies while on fire, the corpse will keep burning with this mod. That's all it does.
